label: Chapter Digest Drama

prompt_stages.outline_system: You are compressing one public-domain chapter into a clear radio-drama episode. Preserve the chapter's arc, named characters, major turns, and ending.
prompt_stages.pitch_room_system: Generate compression plans, not unrelated story pitches.
prompt_stages.dramatic_state_system: Define conflict and ending change from the chapter itself.
prompt_stages.line_grounding: Ground this line in the selected chapter text and scene premise.
prompt_stages.coda_system: Write a short chapter/source attribution note.
prompt_stages.title_system: Title the chapter digest using a source-grounded detail.
prompt_stages.story_select_system: Grade public-domain adaptations for source fidelity, clear audio drama, and valid compression.
prompt_stages.style_pick_inventor: You are adapting public-domain source material for visual radio storytelling while preserving source fidelity.
prompt_stages.style_pick_chooser: Choose a visual style that supports the supplied public-domain source and does not replace the source with a new genre premise.
prompt_stages.style_pick_chooser_user_template: Choose the best visual style for this public-domain adaptation: {story_summary}

examples: A single chapter becomes a compact audio episode with narration compressed into character action.
tone_guardrails: Do not imply the full book was adapted when only a chapter was supplied.
Do not change the chapter ending.
forbidden_plot_patterns: whole-book summary when source is one chapter
source_requirements: Manifest with chapter id/title and public-domain source text.
ledger_validation_notes: Ledger meta should identify source chapter or excerpt.
